text.title: Creating or Updating Claude Code Skills Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the skills methodology end-to-end.

step.name: decide-skill-vs-alternative
step.action: Apply Agent/Skill/Command decision tree. If single-shot, use prompt. If multi-stage isolated, use Agent. If small + manual, use Command.
step.decision-gate: If decision != skill, STOP and apply the right component's methodology.

step.name: decide-global-vs-project
step.action: Shared across > 1 project → global (faion-network/skills/). Project-specific → project repo + gitignore.

step.name: write-skill-md
step.action: Write SKILL.md with required frontmatter + body ≤ 200 lines. Detail goes to reference.md.

step.name: test-trigger-keywords
step.input: SKILL.md + 10 sample user phrasings + adjacent skills
step.action: Send each phrasing; confirm intended skill auto-fires + does NOT steal from peers.
step.decision-gate: If overlap detected, narrow keywords or rename skill.

step.name: validate-and-register
step.action: Run validate-skills.py. Commit to the right scope (faion-network or project).
